tasks.subject: Task 1: Provisioner cfg-dict regression — Diffusers + ComfyUI
tasks.description:
Append regression tests test_diffusers_provision_receives_dict_cfg + test_comfyui_provision_receives_dict_cfg to tests/core/test_provisioner.py. Lock down full blast radius of provisioner cfg-dict bug (hot-fix e78cafc). See plan doc Task 1 for full code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/core/test_provisioner.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_provisioner.py -v -k 'diffusers_provision_receives_dict or comfyui_provision_receives_dict'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test_diffusers_provision_receives_dict_cfg passes", "test_comfyui_provision_receives_dict_cfg passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: declared_flags WARNING → DEBUG on fresh-discovery path
tasks.description:
Downgrade declared_flags WARNING to DEBUG in JsonProfileCache.discover() (fresh-discovery, probe is source of truth). Keep WARNING in verify() where it signals real drift. See plan doc Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py", "tests/core/test_profiles.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_profiles.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["discover() empty declared_flags logs DEBUG", "verify() empty declared_flags logs WARNING"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: FakeEngine.declared_flags_map default for local-fake.yaml key
tasks.description:
Populate FakeEngine.declared_flags_map with entry matching local-fake.yaml capability key. Local-fake smoke should produce no WARNING records. See plan doc Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_fake.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_fake.py -v -k declared_flags", "acceptanceCriteria": ["declared_flags returns populated dict for local-fake key", "Manual smoke produces no WARNING records"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Pydantic validators on HostedEngineConfig
tasks.description:
Add @field_validator on api_key_env (non-empty) and endpoint (http:// or https:// prefix) to HostedEngineConfig. Move runtime errors to config load. See plan doc Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v -k hosted_validator", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Empty api_key_env rejected", "Relative endpoint rejected", "Well-formed config constructs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: HostedAPIEngine runtime AuthError defense-in-depth + declared_flags_map default
tasks.description:
Replace AuthError(f"missing {key_name}") with clearer two-branch message. Populate declared_flags_map default for hosted.yaml key (xfail until Task 6). See plan doc Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_hosted.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v -k 'auth_error_message or declared_flags_default'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AuthError msg contains 'engine.hosted.api_key_env is empty'", "declared_flags_map populated (xfail until Task 6)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Rewrite examples/configs/hosted.yaml + remove Task 5 xfail
tasks.description:
Rewrite examples/configs/hosted.yaml with absolute URL + api_key_env + health_url + shim contract docs. Remove Task 5 xfail marker. See plan doc Task 6 for full YAML.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/hosted.yaml", "tests/engines/test_hosted.py", "tests/test_examples.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_hosted.py tests/test_examples.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hosted.yaml loads under validators", "Top comment documents shim contract", "Task 5 xfail removed and passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: core/provision_state.py marker helpers + tests
tasks.description:
Create src/kinoforge/core/provision_state.py with marker_path / read_marker (None on any failure) / write_marker (atomic) / is_marker_current. Foundation for Task 9. See plan doc Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/provision_state.py", "tests/core/test_provision_state.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_provision_state.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["marker_path layout correct", "read_marker None on absent/corrupt/missing-keys", "write_marker atomic", "is_marker_current staleness rule"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: UX A hosted preflight in orchestrator.generate()
tasks.description:
Add Step 2.5 to orchestrator.generate(): if not requires_compute, call engine.provision(None, cfg_dict). Fail fast on missing cred or unreachable health URL before any backend.submit. See plan doc Task 8.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v -k hosted_preflight", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provision called once before any submit", "AuthError blocks submit", "Health KinoforgeError blocks submit", "Compute path unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: UX A compute preflight — marker + acquire_lock
tasks.description:
Add state_dir arg to generate(). Extract _provision_compute_once helper that acquires store.acquire_lock(f"provision:{instance.id}", ttl_s=300), reads marker, runs provisioner.provision if absent/stale, writes marker. Call after both create_instance loops. See plan doc Task 9.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "src/kinoforge/cli.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_compute.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_compute.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["First generate writes marker + provisions", "Second same-key generate skips provision", "Stale-key generate reprovisions", "Concurrent generates lock-serialize"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: FalEngineConfig pydantic block + KNOWN_ENGINES update
tasks.description:
Add FalEngineConfig class (endpoint, queue_base, api_key_env, url_path, asset_paths, health_url + 4 validators). Add engine.fal field. Update KNOWN_ENGINES. Extend Config._validate_cross_fields. See plan doc Task 10.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v -k fal", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Defaults populated", "Required field violations rejected", "Bad queue_base URL rejected", "fal kind without block rejected", "KNOWN_ENGINES contains 'fal'"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: FalEngine + FalBackend + wire helpers + tests
tasks.description:
Implement src/kinoforge/engines/fal/{__init__.py,wire.py} with FalEngine + FalBackend targeting fal.ai queue API. Pure wire helpers (interpret_status, build_status_url, build_response_url, extract_result_url) in wire.py. Self-register under 'fal'. See plan doc Task 11.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/fal/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/fal/wire.py", "tests/engines/test_fal.py", "tests/engines/test_fal_wire.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_fal.py tests/engines/test_fal_wire.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FalEngine.provision cred/health behaviours correct", "FalBackend.submit POST shape + auth + asset injection", "FalBackend.result poll transitions", "Wire helpers pass in isolation", "Engine self-registers under 'fal'"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: _adapters.py + fal.yaml + invariant allowlist + tooling
tasks.description:
Wire fal engine into _adapters.py. Ship examples/configs/fal.yaml. Extend test_core_invariant.py allowlist. Add live pytest marker to pyproject.toml + test-live task to pixi.toml. See plan doc Task 12.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "examples/configs/fal.yaml", "tests/test_core_invariant.py", "tests/test_examples.py", "pyproject.toml", "pixi.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py tests/test_core_invariant.py -v && pixi run python -m kinoforge deploy --config examples/configs/fal.yaml --dry-run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CLI imports + dry-run works", "fal.yaml loads", "Invariant allowlist extended", "live marker + test-live task added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Live opt-in test + manual smoke (USER-GATE — first real fal.ai response)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Produce kinoforge's first real public-provider artifact. Create tests/live/test_fal_live.py (subprocess-driven, MP4-magic assertion, gated by KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 + FAL_KEY). Run manual smoke against fal.ai. Update README + PROGRESS Phase 19 with first-real-artifact details. Merge to main via --no-ff. See plan doc Task 13.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/__init__.py", "tests/live/test_fal_live.py", "README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_fal_live.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Skips cleanly without env vars", "Live tests PASS with FAL_KEY", "Manual smoke produces MP4 with ftyp magic at offset 4", "Artifact + capability_key + git SHA recorded in PROGRESS", "README has fal.ai quickstart"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["live-pytest", "test-live"], ["manual-smoke", "ftyp", "MP4-magic"]], "failurePolicy": "block-on-fail", "gateScope": "task-only"}
```
